economic_notes: First Nation holds a one-seventh ownership in South Beach Casino Limited Partnership (casino and hotel on Brokenhead Ojibway Nation land at Scanterbury, MB). Also holds 51% of Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (proportionate consolidation). Wanipigaa-Sibi Development Corporation fully consolidated.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to unavailability of accounting records for Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. (51% owned). Auditor's report dated March 31, 2023 — approximately two years after fiscal year end. Budget information not provided and omitted from financial statements, noted as departure from PSA standards. South Beach Casino LP investment declined significantly (loss of $687,835 vs income of $607,542 prior year). Demand loan of $1,169,501 for legal claim against Government of Canada. CMHC replacement reserve underfunded by $249,088. expenses_enterprises combines SIBI Development Corporation ($6,170) and Hollow Water-WERI Construction Ltd. ($281,627). total_government_transfers includes ISC $9,792,703 + Health Canada $3,767,051 + CMHC $335,769 + net deferred adjustments (-$1,652,516) + Province of Manitoba $179,186 + Dept of Justice $135,013 + Southeast Resource Dev Council $354,977 + Assembly of Manitoba Chiefs $347,588 + Manitoba Hydro $42,158 = approximately $13,301,929 before deferred; using gross government transfer lines: ISC+Health Canada+CMHC+Province+Dept Justice+SRDC+AMC+Manitoba Hydro = 14,954,481 gross; osr calculated as total revenue minus gross government transfers.
